originContent: Spring ViewComponent allows you to create typesafe, reusable & encapsulated server-rendered UI components.
translatedContent: Spring ViewComponent 允许您创建类型安全、可重用且封装的服务器渲染 UI 组件。

originContent: ViewComponents consolidate the logic needed for a template into a single class,
translatedContent: ViewComponent 将模板所需的逻辑整合到一个单一的类中，

originContent: resulting in a cohesive object that is easy to understand.
translatedContent: 从而形成一个易于理解的内聚对象。

originContent: A Spring ViewComponent is a Spring Bean that defines the context for our Template:
translatedContent: Spring ViewComponent 是一个 Spring Bean，定义了我们模板的上下文：

originContent: public record SimpleView(String helloWorld) implements ViewContext {
translatedContent: public record SimpleView(String helloWorld) implements ViewContext {

originContent: We define the context by creating a record that implements the ViewContext interface
translatedContent: 我们通过创建一个实现了 ViewContext 接口的记录来定义上下文

originContent: Next, we add the `@ViewComponent` annotation to a class and define a method that returns the `SimpleView` record.
translatedContent: 接下来，我们在一个类上添加 `@ViewComponent` 注解，并定义一个返回 `SimpleView` 记录的方法。

originContent: data class SimpleView(val helloWorld: String) : ViewContext
translatedContent: data class SimpleView(val helloWorld: String) : ViewContext

originContent: A ViewComponent always needs a corresponding HTML Template.
translatedContent: 一个 ViewComponent 总是需要一个对应的 HTML 模板。

originContent: We define the Template in the SimpleViewComponent.[html/jte/kte] In the same package as our ViewComponent class.
translatedContent: 我们在 SimpleViewComponent.[html/jte/kte] 中定义模板，
与我们的 ViewComponent 类位于同一个包中。

originContent: We can then call the render method in our controller to render the template.
translatedContent: 然后我们可以在控制器中调用 render 方法来渲染模板。

originContent: If you want to get started right away you can find examples for all possible language combinations here:
translatedContent: 如果您想立即开始，可以在此处找到所有可能语言组合的示例：

originContent: We can nest components by passing a ViewContext as property of our record,
translatedContent: 我们可以通过将 ViewContext 作为记录的属性传递来嵌套组件，

originContent: if we also have it as parameter of our render method we can easily create layouts:
translatedContent: 如果我们在渲染方法中也将其作为参数，就可以轻松创建布局：

originContent: private record LayoutView(ViewContext nestedViewComponent) implements ViewContext {
translatedContent: private record LayoutView(ViewContext nestedViewComponent) implements ViewContext {

originContent: data class LayoutView(val nestedViewComponent: ViewContext) : ViewContext
translatedContent: data class LayoutView(val nestedViewComponent: ViewContext) : ViewContext

originContent: In Thymeleaf we render the passed ViewComponent with the `view:component="${viewContext}"` attribute.
translatedContent: 在 Thymeleaf 中，我们使用 `view:component="${viewContext}"` 属性来渲染传递的 ViewComponent。

originContent: In JTE/KTE we can just call the LayoutView record directly in an expression:
translatedContent: 在 JTE/KTE 中，我们可以直接在表达式中调用 LayoutView 记录：

originContent: You can enable hot-reloading of the templates in development, you need to have Spring Boot DevTools as a dependency.
translatedContent: 您可以在开发中启用模板的热重载，您需要将 Spring Boot DevTools 作为依赖项。

originContent: Spring ViewComponent wraps the Spring MVC container using an AspectJ Aspect and automatically resolves the template and puts the ViewContext in the ModelAndViewContainer
translatedContent: Spring ViewComponent 使用 AspectJ 切面封装 Spring MVC 容器，自动解析模板并将 ViewContext 放入 ModelAndViewContainer 中
